Box #11—Do it Yourself
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #5—Box #11 Do it Yourself
*How might the whole or part do something on its own that it’s not doing now?
Can it perform some other helpful or supplemental function, such as fixing or serving itself?
How might your kids feed themselves? Can a department or employee take on an additional
function? For example, can a team be more self-regulating? One of my favorite examples of
this is that farmers used to have a difficult time running all the piping needed to irrigate their
fields. Then Frank Zybach invented the self-propelled irrigation system that “did it itself,”
eliminating the need for piping and revolutionizing farming in the dry Midwest plains states.
You know those circles you see when you fly cross-country? Those aren’t crop circles made
by aliens. They’ve from Frank’s self-propelled irrigation systems operating around a central
pivot. Notice today how often we consumers are asked to “do it ourselves” when it comes to
automated support and even assembling our own furniture.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
